title: ジャパンカップの後に・愛すべき好敵手

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! You have improved, Tempest Lord.
However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It was not enough to halt the newly awakened
Centurial Overlord's surge through frozen tundra!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... You're too strong, Opera O...
T.M. Opera O has defeated Meisho Doto.

It appears as though their conflict has been
settled for now...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What say you, Doto? With this act concluded, is
it not time to define our roles betwixt each other?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Answer me, Meisho Doto! Who are you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are you my lifelong adversary? Do you play a
part in Ragnarok, the seemingly endless battle of
the gods?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngghhh... Um... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Will I become your adversary?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I will... NOT!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wha... How can this be?!

Poignant words echo through the crisp fall air in
Fuchu.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
After running with you today... now I know for
sure that you're not my enemy, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're my idol, the one I'll keep running after—as
long as I liiiive!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I only got as strong as I am now because of you...
And I can get even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You're not my enemy, you're... something more
comforting. There's no reason for me to want to
hurt you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So I want to be your... rival! Not your adversary,
but your lifelong rival.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to be the rival who runs with you
always—sometimes winning, sometimes losing!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I think... I'll be happiest that way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Happiest, you say...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Doto... I see you have found your
answer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then so it shall be!

T.M. Opera O pulls Meisho Doto to the front of
the stands.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hear me! All fans in attendance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
From this day forth, Meisho Doto will be my
closest rival!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I wish for you to watch our beautiful bond as we
come to understand one another through our
fierce battles on the track.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I hereby promise this! With a worthy
adversary at my side, I will continue to build my
shining momentum...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And overcome the Golden Generation at the
end-of-the-year Arima Kinen!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Will that suffice, my dear friend Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Um, also... Please do your best at the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So I shall. I'll do my part as ruler of our generation
to represent you and Ayabe as well.

And so their tale comes to a happy conclusion,
with the two hand in hand as friends and
competitors.

But the real battle starts now. The mightiest
generation awaits the mightiest king at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let us be off, Trainer, to the last grand spectacle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With Doto unable to join, it seems I alone will
enter the fray against the heroes of the previous
generation...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But fear not! With you at my side, we can
overcome anything!

We exchange looks as we reaffirm our fervent
determination. T.M. Opera O then turns to the
sold-out stands.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! I am T.M. Opera O! And
today, my generation has been unified.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We shall hereby be known as the T.M. Opera
Opposition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As you are well aware, Umamusume are entered
into the Arima Kinen based on popular vote.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Which means your support is vital if I am to make
it to the top. So hear me now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I beseech you, everyone gathered at this track, to
vote for the T.M. Opera Opposition! Together,
we cannot be defeated!

She implores the crowd for their votes. Perhaps
lost in the moment, she begins sounding like a
politician.
